title: pyrethrum daucifolium
intro: Pyrethrum daucifolium, also known as Tanacetum daucifolium, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including relief from pain, fever reduction, and treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum daucifolium can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
